crossComponentPatterns: Rounded silhouettes use a single oversized radius token to keep the system soft and toy-like.
Primary actions lean on saturated pink fills with white text, while secondary states stay powdery and editorial.
Data surfaces use blush neutrals and pink-tinted shadows instead of grayscale elevation.
